title: My wanting is sacred. I am allowed to want this much
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for releasing guilt about wanting financial abundance.
excerpt: A short energy statement for releasing the learned belief that wanting wealth is selfish, and allowing the desire to be present without apology. Use when wanting itself feels like a character flaw.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 15 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when guilt around wanting money or wealth is active, or when you catch yourself editing down what you actually want.

content.text: A short energy statement for releasing the guilt around wanting financial abundance and claiming the desire as allowed. The release names what was learned; the allow names what is true.
I am ready to release the guilt that tells me wanting wealth is wrong or selfish. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow my desire for financial abundance, fully and without apology. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 15 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
